title: Allahabad High Court RO ARO Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://www.allahabadhighcourt.in/ Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. jobs_info: Allahabad High Court RO ARO Vacancy 2026: Allahabad High Court, Allahabad (UP), has issued a notification for the position of Computer Assistant, RO & ARO. The recruitment drive comprises 543 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the Allahabad High Court RO ARO Vacancy 2026 official notification and apply before 21-06-2026, the last Date. Also, see all the information related to the post on the official website. All relevant information regarding the Allahabad High Court RO ARO Vacancy 2026 is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Any Bachelor’s Degree, O’ Level / CCC Computer Course, English Typing: 25 wpm, Knowledge of Data Entry, Word Processing & Computer Operation.
